parameters.jsonBody:
=JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 4000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a startup builder. Create a complete product brief and landing page for this SaaS idea.

Idea: ' + $json.title + '
Description: ' + ($json.description || '') + '

Generate a JSON response with this EXACT structure:
{
  "productName": "Short catchy name",
  "tagline": "One line that sells",
  "problem": "The painful problem in 2 sentences",
  "solution": "How this product solves it in 2 sentences",
  "targetAudience": "Exactly who this is for",
  "pricing": [{"plan": "Starter", "price": "$29/mo", "features": ["f1", "f2", "f3"]}, {"plan": "Pro", "price": "$79/mo", "features": ["f1", "f2", "f3", "f4"]}],
  "features": ["Feature 1", "Feature 2", "Feature 3", "Feature 4", "Feature 5", "Feature 6"],
  "techStack": ["Next.js", "TypeScript", "Tailwind CSS", "Stripe", "Supabase"],
  "mvpSteps": [{"day": "День 1-2", "task": "Setup & Auth"}, {"day": "День 3-5", "task": "Core feature"}, {"day": "День 6-7", "task": "Payments & Launch"}],
  "landingPageHtml": "FULL single-file HTML with inline CSS, dark theme, responsive. Hero with CTA, features grid, pricing cards, footer.",
  "domain": "suggested-domain.com"
}

Reply ONLY with valid JSON.' }] })
